title: Country Graph Dataset
description: Node-by-node geography game country graph. Each country is a node with searchable aliases and neighbor edges (including maritime links).

version.description: Semantic version of the dataset format.

updatedAt.description: ISO date when this dataset was last modified.

name.description: Canonical display name shown after a correct guess.

mapName.description: Exact name used in the world TopoJSON properties.name field.

aliases.description: Accepted answer strings for fuse.js fuzzy matching.

land_borders.description: IDs of countries sharing a land border with this nation.

maritime_links.description: IDs of countries reachable by sea from this nation (ferry/air gameplay links).

inDailyPool.description: Whether this country can be selected as the daily starting node.

iso3166Alpha2.description: Optional ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code for future Supabase integration.
